name: BKPF
title: Accounting Document Header
description: One header record per posted FI document. Contains company code, document date, posting date, document type, and reference. Always join to BSEG for line item details.

name: BSEG
title: Accounting Document Segment (Line Items)
description: Line item detail for every FI document. One row per line item. Contains G/L account, amount, cost center, and posting key. Cluster table — use FB03 or FBL3N to read efficiently.

name: BSIS
title: Accounting: Secondary Index for G/L Accounts (Open Items)
description: Secondary index for open G/L account line items. Faster than reading BSEG directly for open item queries. Cleared items move to BSAS.

name: BSAS
title: Accounting: Secondary Index for G/L Accounts (Cleared Items)
description: Secondary index for cleared G/L account line items. Paired with BSIS — open items are in BSIS, cleared items move here after clearing.

name: BSID
title: Accounting: Secondary Index for Customers (Open Items)
description: Secondary index for open customer (AR) line items. Used by FBL5N. Cleared items are stored in BSAD.

name: BSIK
title: Accounting: Secondary Index for Vendors (Open Items)
description: Secondary index for open vendor (AP) line items. Used by FBL1N. Cleared items are stored in BSAK.

name: SKA1
title: G/L Account Master (Chart of Accounts)
description: G/L account master data at chart of accounts level. Contains account group, account type, and short/long text. Company code-specific data is in SKB1.

name: SKB1
title: G/L Account Master (Company Code)
description: G/L account master data specific to a company code. Contains reconciliation account type, field status group, and sort key.

name: T001
title: Company Codes
description: Master table for SAP company codes. Contains company name, country, currency, and chart of accounts assignment.

name: REGUH
title: Payment Program: Settlement Data
description: Header data generated by the F110 automatic payment program. One record per payment document. Contains bank details, payment method, and payment amount.

name: REGUP
title: Payment Program: Processed Items
description: Line items processed by the F110 payment run. Contains the invoices and credit memos cleared by each payment document.

name: CSKS
title: Cost Center Master Data
description: Cost center master data per controlling area. Contains cost center category, responsible person, and validity period.

name: CSKT
title: Cost Center Texts
description: Language-dependent descriptions for cost centers. Join to CSKS to get the cost center name in a specific language.

name: AUFK
title: Order Master Data
description: Master data for CO internal orders, PM orders, and production orders. Contains order type, responsible cost center, and status.

name: COSP
title: CO Object: Cost Totals for External Postings
description: Aggregated cost totals for controlling objects (cost centers, orders) from external FI postings. Used for reporting and plan vs actual comparisons.

name: MARA
title: General Material Data
description: General (client-level) master data for a material. Contains material type, industry sector, base unit of measure, and gross weight. Plant-specific data is in MARC.

name: MARC
title: Plant Data for Material
description: Material master data at plant level. Contains MRP type, procurement type, lot size, and production scheduler. One row per material per plant.

name: MARD
title: Storage Location Data for Material
description: Stock quantities per material, plant, and storage location. Contains unrestricted stock, quality inspection stock, and blocked stock.

name: MAKT
title: Material Descriptions
description: Language-dependent short text descriptions for materials. Join to MARA or MARC to display the material description.

name: MKPF
title: Header: Material Document
description: Header record for material documents (goods movements). One row per goods movement posting. Contains posting date and movement type reference.

name: MSEG
title: Document Segment: Material
description: Line items for material documents. Contains material, plant, storage location, quantity, movement type, and account assignment per movement.

name: EKKO
title: Purchasing Document Header
description: Header data for all purchasing documents: purchase orders, scheduling agreements, and contracts. Contains vendor, purchasing organization, and document date.

name: EKPO
title: Purchasing Document Item
description: Item data for purchasing documents. Contains material, plant, quantity, delivery date, and net price per line item.

name: EKET
title: Scheduling Agreement Schedule Lines
description: Delivery schedule lines for purchase orders and scheduling agreements. Contains planned delivery quantities and dates per schedule line.

name: EBAN
title: Purchase Requisition
description: Purchase requisition header and item data. Contains requested material, quantity, delivery date, and account assignment.

name: LFA1
title: Vendor Master (General Section)
description: General vendor master data at client level. Contains vendor name, address, country, and search terms. Company code data is in LFB1.

name: LFB1
title: Vendor Master (Company Code)
description: Vendor master data specific to a company code. Contains payment terms, reconciliation account, and payment method.

name: LFM1
title: Vendor Master (Purchasing)
description: Vendor master data for purchasing org level. Contains order currency, incoterms, and planned delivery time.

name: T001W
title: Plants / Branches
description: Plant master table. Contains plant name, address, and company code assignment. Reference table for all plant-level data.

name: VBAK
title: Sales Document: Header Data
description: Header data for all sales documents: orders, quotations, returns, and contracts. Contains sold-to party, sales area, and document date.

name: VBAP
title: Sales Document: Item Data
description: Item-level data for sales documents. Contains material, order quantity, plant, pricing, and schedule lines. One row per item.

name: VBUK
title: Sales Document: Header Status
description: Overall processing status for sales document headers. Contains delivery status, billing status, and rejection status.

name: VBUP
title: Sales Document: Item Status
description: Processing status at sales document item level. Contains delivery and billing status per item.

name: VBFA
title: Sales Document Flow
description: Document flow table linking sales documents to subsequent documents (deliveries, invoices). Tracks the full processing chain from order to invoice.

name: LIKP
title: Delivery Header Data
description: Header data for outbound deliveries. Contains ship-to party, shipping point, goods issue date, and delivery status.

name: LIPS
title: Delivery Item Data
description: Item-level data for deliveries. Contains material, delivery quantity, storage location, and batch.

name: VBRK
title: Billing Document: Header Data
description: Header data for billing documents (invoices, credit memos, debit memos). Contains customer, billing date, and net amount.

name: VBRP
title: Billing Document: Item Data
description: Item-level data for billing documents. Contains material, billed quantity, net value, and tax amount per line.

name: KNA1
title: General Data in Customer Master
description: General customer master data at client level. Contains customer name, address, country, and search terms. Company code data is in KNB1.

name: KNB1
title: Customer Master (Company Code)
description: Customer master data specific to a company code. Contains payment terms, reconciliation account, and dunning data.

name: KNVV
title: Customer Master Sales Data
description: Customer master data per sales area. Contains sales district, customer group, price list, and incoterms.

name: KONV
title: Conditions (Transaction Data)
description: Pricing condition values determined during document processing. Contains the condition amounts for each condition type in orders, deliveries, and invoices.

name: PA0001
title: HR Master Record: Organizational Assignment (IT0001)
description: Infotype 0001 — org assignment for each employee. Contains personnel area, personnel subarea, employee group, employee subgroup, and position.

name: PA0002
title: HR Master Record: Personal Data (IT0002)
description: Infotype 0002 — personal data for each employee. Contains first name, last name, date of birth, gender, and nationality.

name: PA0007
title: HR Master Record: Planned Working Time (IT0007)
description: Infotype 0007 — planned working time and work schedule for each employee. Drives time evaluation and quota generation.

name: PA0008
title: HR Master Record: Basic Pay (IT0008)
description: Infotype 0008 — basic pay for each employee. Contains wage type amounts, pay scale group, and level.

name: PA0014
title: HR Master Record: Recurring Payments/Deductions (IT0014)
description: Infotype 0014 — recurring payroll payments and deductions. Contains wage types for allowances, deductions, and other recurring items.

name: HRP1000
title: Infotype 1000 DB Table for OM Objects
description: Stores org objects for organizational management: org units, positions, jobs, and persons. Central OM table.

name: HRP1001
title: Infotype 1001: Relationships Between OM Objects
description: Stores relationships between org management objects: org unit to position, position to job, org unit to org unit (hierarchy).

name: AFKO
title: Order Header Data: Production Orders
description: Header data for production orders and process orders. Contains material, plant, order type, scheduled dates, and order status.

name: AFPO
title: Order Item: Production Orders
description: Item data for production orders. Contains the material to be produced, order quantity, and production version.

name: MAST
title: Material to BOM Link
description: Links materials to their Bills of Material. Use this to find which BOM applies for a material and plant combination.

name: STKO
title: BOM Header
description: Header data for Bills of Material. Contains BOM category, status, and validity period.

name: STPO
title: BOM Item
description: Component items within a Bill of Material. Contains component material, quantity, unit of measure, and item category.

name: PROJ
title: Project Definition
description: Project master data for SAP Project System. Contains project profile, responsible person, and basic dates.

name: PRPS
title: WBS Element Master Data
description: Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) element master data. Contains WBS code, description, responsible cost center, and account assignment.

name: EQUI
title: Equipment Master Data
description: Master data for technical equipment in Plant Maintenance. Contains equipment category, manufacturer, serial number, and functional location assignment.

name: IFLOT
title: Functional Location (Technical Objects)
description: Master data for functional locations in Plant Maintenance. Represents the physical structure and location of technical objects.

name: T000
title: Clients
description: Master table of all SAP clients in the system. Contains client name, city, and logical system name.

name: TSTC
title: SAP Transaction Codes
description: Directory of all SAP transaction codes and their linked program or function module. Useful for finding programs behind transactions.

name: TSTCT
title: Transaction Code Texts
description: Language-dependent descriptions for SAP transaction codes. Join to TSTC to get the transaction description in a specific language.

name: TADIR
title: Directory of Repository Objects
description: Catalogue of all repository objects in the system: programs, function groups, classes, tables, and more. Contains package assignment and original system.

name: TRDIR
title: ABAP Program Directory
description: Contains attributes for all ABAP programs: type (report, module pool, function group), status, and fixed point arithmetic setting.

name: TVARVC
title: Table of Variables in Selection Criteria
description: Stores variable values used in report selection variants. Useful for centralising configurable parameters used in ABAP report variants.

name: NAST
title: Message Status
description: Stores the status of output messages (print, email, EDI) triggered from business documents. Tracks whether output was sent successfully.

name: EDID4
title: IDoc Data Records
description: Stores the segment data for all IDocs. Contains the actual payload of each IDoc segment.

name: EDIDC
title: IDoc Control Records
description: Control record for each IDoc. Contains direction (inbound/outbound), message type, status, sender, and receiver details.

name: USR01
title: User Master Record (Runtime Data)
description: Runtime user master record. Contains user parameters, default printer, and logon language. Maintained automatically.

name: USR02
title: Logon Data
description: User logon data including password hash, account validity dates, and lock status. Used to verify user accounts and lock status.

name: USR04
title: User Master Authorizations
description: Links users to their assigned authorization profiles. Contains the profile names directly assigned to each user.

name: AGR_USERS
title: Assignment of Roles to Users
description: Stores which roles (activity groups) are assigned to which users, including validity dates. Primary table for user-role assignments.

name: AGR_1251
title: Authorization Data for Roles
description: Contains the actual authorization object values assigned to each role. The core table for what a role permits — joined with AGR_USERS to check effective user permissions.
